description: An international shipment from a supplier is being held by customs. An agent must provide the necessary documentation to clear it.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification from the customs broker that a shipment is on hold.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent is alerted to the customs hold.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the commercial invoice, packing list, and bill of lading for the shipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all the required shipping documents.

nodes.task_description: Submit the required documentation to the customs broker.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the documents to the broker.
